title: Leggings Hanger Organizer, 3 Pack Trouser Hangers with 10 Clips Metal, Underwear Coat Hangers, for Wardrobe Storage, Pants & Skirt Storage
features: 30 large capacity: Trouser hangers optimizes your closet space; They include two hangers; Each hanger has ten large clips and can hold up to 20 pairs of leggings, keeping your wardrobe tidy and orderly.

Pants hanger saves space: Our clip hangers effectively utilize the vertical space in the wardrobe, allowing you to store more items in a compact space. The curved hanger aligns your pants with other clothes in the closet so they don't protrude or block anything, making it easier and faster for you to remove your pants from the hanger.
Windproof hook: The trouser hangers with a with a latch can prevent clothes from being blown away. Don't worry about the clothes rack falling off the clothesline due to the wind.

Grasp tightly without leaving any marks: Our hangers with clips is made of high-quality, heavy-duty carbon steel, and the clip and main body are protected by dipping glue, which will not harm the pants or leave any marks

Multi functional: Our hangers for clothes space savers are sturdy and suitable for pants, boots, hats, ties, belts, socks, gloves, and more. Suitable for laundry racks, wardrobes, clotheslines, and shower curtain rods.
description: Product Description Trouser Hangers with Clips Trousers hangers made of high-quality stainless steel, it has strong load-bearing capacity and is not easily deformed; The large clips of these skirt hangers with clips are coated with anti slip rubber at both ends, providing excellent grip and leaving no marks on the clothes. Windproof Hook Windproof design, can be hung on doors, RVs, or outdoors, without worrying about being blown away by the wind. Strong Clothesline Our trouser hangers with clips has strong clips for leggings.
